rationale: In the model background, the citing paper explicitly uses Janakiraman, Sismeiro, and Dutta (2009) to motivate its central premise that spillovers can occur between similar competing brands. This is not a generic background list citation; it helps define the specific research gap and justifies modeling cross-brand learning. The citing study then advances that line in a new domain by examining private labels across retailers and by testing additional boundary conditions and competitive implications.
relation_description: The citing paper builds on the cited paper's core idea of perception spillovers across competing brands and extends it to cross-retailer private-label learning. It develops a structural dynamic choice model in this new context and studies resulting effects on private-label versus national-brand competition.
